en.title: For Starlink Mount for Mini Dish to Poles, RV Ladders, Railings, Racks
en.description_html:
Starlink Mini Ladder Mount unlocks seamless internet connectivity on all your adventures. It helps effortlessly attach your Starlink Mini to RVs, roof racks, yachts, or railings for a stable and secure connection. Crafted from durable aluminum alloy, this mount ensures you stay connected wherever your travels take you.

Features:

  • Unleash Lightning-Fast Internet, Anywhere - Starlink Mini Ladder Mount elevates your internet experience anywhere you go. Securely attach your dish to RV ladders, roof racks, yachts, and railings, unlocking reliable internet connectivity on all your adventures

  • Effortless Installation in Seconds - This Starlink Mini mount allows for quick and easy attachment of your Starlink Mini to any crossbar or railing, so you can get online and stay connected in no time

  • Rock-Solid Stability on the Go - Crafted with thickened aluminum alloy, this mount provides corrosion resistance, stability, and security, even on the roughest roads or choppiest seas. Your Starlink Mini will stay firmly in place, without worrying about harsh weather conditions

  • Universal Crossbar Compatibility - Designed to fit crossbars ranging from 0.8" to 1.17", this mount offers wide compatibility with a variety of roof racks, ladders, and railings. Enjoy hassle-free integration with your existing setup

  • Stay Connected, Stay Informed - Don't let your adventures limit your connectivity. With this Starlink Mini mount, you can stream, browse, and stay in touch with loved ones, no matter where you roam

Specifications:

  • Overall Dimension(LxWxH): 5 1/4" x 3" x 1 3/4" (13.3 x 7.6 x 4.4 cm)

  • Pole Size(Dia.xL): 1 1/2" x 5 1/8" (3.8 x 13 cm)

  • Pole Inner Diameter: 7/8" (2.3 cm)

  • Fits Rail Diameter: 0.8" to 1.17"

  • Material: Aluminum

  • Net Weight: 0.66 Lb (0.3 kg)

Package Includes:

  • 1x Aluminum Pole

  • 1x Clamp

  • 2x Allen Keys

  • 1x M6*20 Screw

  • 1x M5*20 Screw

  • 1x Manual
